summary: Current B-hand artifacts prove ROI/token evidence, a decoder skeleton, a scaffold-connected proxy, weak label/depth diagnostics, and a joint contract probe. They do not prove a continuous left/right hand surface connected to wrists/arms. The only connected mesh artifact on disk is B_hand4, and its own summary records pass=false because the upstream B_hand3 raw SMPL-X hand gate failed.

missing_artifact.name: B_hand7_continuous_connected_hand_surface_review
required_content: left Open3D screenshots: front, side, top, iso
right Open3D screenshots: front, side, top, iso
combined hands+wrist+forearm Open3D screenshots: front, side, top, iso
largest connected component and fragmentation stats per side
explicit left/right hand presence, wrist-to-forearm connection, palm continuity, and finger-structure readout
explicit labeling that any SMPL-X, MediaPipe, or connected-template contribution is weak support only
must_not_be_replaced_by: B_hand4 connected-template or SMPL-X scaffold proxy
MediaPipe hand landmarks or patches only
sparse query proposals without wrist/palm/finger surface continuity
numeric-only pass without Open3D visual review

blockers: B-hand3 upstream raw SMPL-X hand gate did not pass, so this is fail.
Connected template/SMPL-X hand topology is a scaffold only, not hand success.
No teacher, candidate, predictions, registry, training, inference, or cloud export was created.
Open3D-readable connected proxy still requires human visual review before any future gate claim.

data_needed_to_unblock: A same-frame dense hand/arm surface mesh, pointcloud, or signed-surface artifact with left and right hands present.
The dense artifact must include wrists and enough forearm/arm context to verify hands are connected to arms, not detached sheets or floating blobs.
The dense artifact must provide palm continuity and visible finger surface structure, or explicitly report missing fingers as a failure.
The artifact must be independent of pure SMPL-X/template/MediaPipe topology success; those sources may only be weak support/provenance.
Camera/provenance mapping to the same local frame used by the B-hand evidence cache and existing predictions.
commands_needed_after_data_available: Create the B_hand7 summary JSON/markdown only after the render output includes front/side/top/iso views for left, right, and combined hands, plus per-side connected-component statistics.
